items.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
items.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
items.description: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

items.title: Lindsey Graham died from a rare heart condition. Here’s how to know if you’re at risk.
items.description: Aortic dissections are extremely rare; however, people with a family history or who have been diagnosed with certain genetic syndromes have an elevated risk

items.title: Jamie Dimon says ‘booming’ markets and a ‘fine’ consumer fueled JPMorgan’s blowout profits
items.description: JPMorgan blew past earnings expectations for the second quarter, as CEO Jamie Dimon said markets are booming.

items.title: Your Social Security check could go up by $74 a month next year
items.description: Social Security’s cost-of-living-adjustment could be 3.8% in 2027, as inflation shows signs of cooling.

items.title: IBM’s stock is having its worst day ever after the surprise release of an earnings miss
items.description: IBM’s stock plunges after a preliminary release of profit and revenue that were well below expectations.

items.title: Social Security says it’s handling disability claims better. But it may just be pushing more people  away.
items.description: The rate of denials has increased in disability cases, research shows

items.title: Bank of America’s stock reverses premarket decline in wake of blockbuster earnings report
items.description: Investors initially appeared to be “selling the news” after the bank handily beat Wall Street’s expectations

items.title: Why SpaceX and Tesla are ‘value’ stocks, according to this fund manager
items.description: Tesla and SpaceX may be winners in the next evolution of value investing, says the president and chief investment officer of Tsai Capital, Christopher Tsai.
